tshPath.description: Path to the tsh binary (default: 'tsh' from PATH)

identityFile.description: Path to the tbot identity file (required)

beamsProxy.description: Teleport cluster proxy address for beams (required)

defaultAgent.description: Default agent CLI: 'claude', 'codex', or a custom command (default: 'claude')

defaultTimeout.description: Default max execution time in seconds (default: 300)
